name: std-esign-flow
description: std-esign-flow — the send-for-signature flow: list signature requests, create one (pick document + recipient), resend or cancel, track status. Composes std-file-store + std-esign-request; no document-rendering or code-preview chrome.

schema.name: std-esign-flow
schema.description: std-esign-flow — the send-for-signature flow: list signature requests, create one (pick document + recipient), resend or cancel, track status. Composes std-file-store + std-esign-request; no document-rendering or code-preview chrome.

fields.name: documentId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the associated document.

fields.name: documentName
fields.description: The name of the document associated with the signature request.

fields.name: recipientName
fields.description: The name of the recipient for the signature request.

fields.name: recipientEmail
fields.description: The email address of the recipient.

fields.name: requesterName
fields.description: The name of the user initiating the signature request.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the signature request.

fields.name: sentAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the request was sent.

fields.name: signedAt
fields.description: The date and time the signature was applied.
fields.synonyms: signed date, completion date, signature time

fields.name: pendingId
fields.description: Unique identifier for a pending action or task.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the modal.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the modal's content or function.

emits.description: Indicates a new signature request has been initiated.
Indicates a signature request has been resent.
Signals a signature request has been removed.
Signals that a signature session has been successfully loaded.
Indicates failure to load a signature session.

events.name: SignatureSession loaded
events.description: Signals that a signature session has been successfully loaded.

events.name: SignatureSession load failed
events.description: Indicates failure to load a signature session.

events.name: Create
events.description: Indicates a new signature request has been initiated.

events.name: Resend Request
events.description: Indicates a signature request has been resent.

events.name: Request Delete
events.description: Signals a signature request has been removed.

emits.description: Indicates a successful data save operation.
Indicates the modal window is being closed.
Indicates a failure to load the record data.
Signals that the modal's data has been successfully loaded.

events.name: Open
events.description: A request to display the modal window.

events.name: Close
events.description: Indicates the modal window is being closed.

events.name: Save
events.description: Indicates a successful data save operation.

events.name: ModalRecord load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load the record data.

events.name: ModalRecord loaded
events.description: Signals that the modal's data has been successfully loaded.

icon.label: Which icon appears in the modal header?
icon.description: Lucide icon name shown next to the modal title.
icon.synonyms: header icon, modal icon, title icon

detailPattern.label: Layout pattern
detailPattern.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

mode.label: Is this for creating or editing?
mode.description: create = blank form; edit = pre-filled from the selected row.
mode.synonyms: form mode, create or edit, new or update, add or modify

fields.label: Which fields appear in the form?
fields.description: Entity fields rendered as inputs inside the modal form.
fields.synonyms: form fields, inputs, editable fields, field list

title.label: What should the modal heading say?
title.description: Heading displayed at the top of the modal.
title.synonyms: modal title, dialog heading, panel title, form title

detailSlot.label: Render slot
detailSlot.description: UI slot the modal renders into

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the modal.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the modal's content or function.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the record.

emits.description: Indicates the user has approved the action.
Indicates the action was cancelled by the user.
Indicates failure to load the confirmation action.
Indicates the confirmation action has been successfully loaded.

events.name: Request
events.description: A request for confirmation before proceeding.

events.name: Confirm
events.description: Indicates the user has approved the action.

events.name: Cancel
events.description: Indicates the action was cancelled by the user.

events.name: Close
events.description: Indicates the user dismissed the confirmation.

events.name: ConfirmAction load failed
events.description: Indicates failure to load the confirmation action.

events.name: ConfirmAction loaded
events.description: Indicates the confirmation action has been successfully loaded.

children.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this signature request?

title.label: Modal title
title.description: Heading shown at the top of the confirmation modal

confirmLabel.label: Confirm button
confirmLabel.description: Label on the primary confirm action button

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Icon name displayed in the confirmation modal header

alertMessage.default: Are you sure you want to cancel this signature request?
alertMessage.label: Alert message
alertMessage.description: Body text explaining what the user is confirming

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the confirmation action.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A detailed explanation of the action being confirmed.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the action.

fields.name: pendingId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the pending confirmation request.

emits.description: A new signature session has been initialized.
Indicates a signature request has been resent.
Indicates a signature session has been removed or invalidated.

events.name: Do Create
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new signature request.

events.name: Do Resend
events.description: A request to resend a signature request.

events.name: Do Delete
events.description: A request to remove an item from the current view.

events.name: Session Created
events.description: A new signature session has been initialized.

events.name: Session Resent
events.description: Indicates a signature request has been resent.

events.name: Session Deleted
events.description: Indicates a signature session has been removed or invalidated.
